text: Mmmmmm, mmmmmm, mmmmmm, mmmmmm, mmmmmm, mmmmmm. Puh, put a put a put a put a put a put a put a put a... Well, sometimes I go walking through fields where we walked long ago And that sweet used to be, and the swamp gas is strong But I don't smell that stink like I did when you chased after me And when I think of you and in love, we once knew, and your mouth, filled with fish, guts and slime Cuts and slime, you were looking so fine, when you ripped out that spine, oh, do I ever cross your mind? Oh, how often I wish, that again, I could kiss your fish lips, like I did in your neck As you were warming your eggs, you extended a claw and stroke the small of my back and my breast While you were ripping up bags, that protrude and sack made me weak in the knees every time I love spines, just minute on your lab as you close my back, oh, do I ever cross your mind?

segments.text: Mmmmmm, mmmmmm, mmmmmm, mmmmmm, mmmmmm, mmmmmm.
Puh, put a put a put a put a put a put a put a put a...
Well, sometimes I go walking through fields where we walked long ago
And that sweet used to be, and the swamp gas is strong
But I don't smell that stink like I did when you chased after me
And when I think of you and in love, we once knew, and your mouth, filled with fish, guts and slime
Cuts and slime, you were looking so fine, when you ripped out that spine, oh, do I ever cross your mind?
Oh, how often I wish, that again, I could kiss your fish lips, like I did in your neck
As you were warming your eggs, you extended a claw and stroke the small of my back and my breast
While you were ripping up bags, that protrude and sack made me weak in the knees every time
I love spines, just minute on your lab as you close my back, oh, do I ever cross your mind?
